description_long: This house features a steeply pitched gable roof covered in gray shingles, with a prominent central chimney and a symmetrical facade. The exterior walls are finished in a light-colored material, likely stucco or painted masonry, and the structure is set on a rectangular grassy plot with a wooden walkway leading to the main entrance. A covered porch supported by wooden posts extends across the front, providing a sheltered outdoor space. The windows are arranged in neat, symmetrical rows, with smaller windows on the upper story and larger ones below. The property includes landscaping elements such as a tree, a bench, and a circular stone feature, enhancing its residential appeal. The overall design suggests a blend of traditional and modern influences, with clean lines and functional outdoor areas.
description: A two-story house with a steep gable roof, symmetrical windows, and a covered front porch, set on a landscaped grassy plot with a wooden walkway and outdoor features.
description_view_0: Side view showing the gable end, central chimney, and the water wheel feature attached to the house.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the covered porch, main entrance, symmetrical window arrangement, and landscaped yard with a bench and tree.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the gable end, balcony, and the continuation of the wooden walkway around the house.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a large window, the back lawn, and minimal landscaping details.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with wooden posts, central door, and a wooden walkway leading to the entrance
